title: Do you think Rei knows german
display_title: Do you think Rei knows german
wikitext:
[]: Do you think Rei knows german?             Quote Post by orcot » Mon May 09, 2022 12:37 pm In short do you think Rei knows german? reason pro: we see Rei read a german book Reason contra: - Rei never speaks german (even Shinji bumbles the occasional german line) - Rei isolates herself troughout the school scenes and with the exception of episode 12 where she orders a dinner never speaks to anyone who isn't a NERV employee - Rei seemed to have chosen a german book with a lot of pictures - Rei is reading in fullshine with no pigment in her irises essentialy with max dilated pupils (she might be practical blind) but perhaps we can ignore that because her eyes aren't tearing and we never see her wearing any sunshades anyway. - Rei might have been avoiding Asuka not wanting to be the bad person she might have set herself up with the unrealistic prospect to learn basic german before introducing herself

[]: Re: Do you think Rei knows german?             Quote Post by DOSS216 » Fri Jun 03, 2022 9:47 pm Yeahh she can probably read and write in German, but she can't speak it. Just like how Asuka can speak in Japanese, but can't read or write it. Parallels, man. https://i-was-a-teenage-eldritch-horror ... d-language

Article: Do you think Rei knows german
[]: Do you think Rei knows german?             Quote Post by orcot » Mon May 09, 2022 12:37 pm In short do you think Rei knows german? reason pro: we see Rei read a german book Reason contra: - Rei never speaks german (even Shinji bumbles the occasional german line) - Rei isolates herself troughout the school scenes and with the exception of episode 12 where she orders a dinner never speaks to anyone who isn't a NERV employee - Rei seemed to have chosen a german book with a lot of pictures - Rei is reading in fullshine with no pigment in her irises essentialy with max dilated pupils (she might be practical blind) but perhaps we can ignore that because her eyes aren't tearing and we never see her wearing any sunshades anyway. - Rei might have been avoiding Asuka not wanting to be the bad person she might have set herself up with the unrealistic prospect to learn basic german before introducing herself

[]: Re: Do you think Rei knows german?             Quote Post by DOSS216 » Fri Jun 03, 2022 9:47 pm Yeahh she can probably read and write in German, but she can't speak it. Just like how Asuka can speak in Japanese, but can't read or write it. Parallels, man. https://i-was-a-teenage-eldritch-horror ... d-language
